notes: United States Congress legislation. Congress.gov provides official text and status of federal legislation.

data.description: Invests in domestic semiconductor manufacturing and research. Includes cybersecurity provisions for supply chain security.
data.notes: Public Law 117-167. Signed August 9, 2022. Provides $52.7 billion for semiconductor manufacturing incentives and research. Includes guardrails preventing recipients from expanding semiconductor manufacturing in countries of concern. Title III addresses science and innovation including cybersecurity research.
